summary:
Suctioning should be limited to no more than 15 seconds to prevent hypoxia, mucosal damage, and vasovagal responses. Current guidelines support a safe duration between 10 and 15 seconds, making Option A the most appropriate choice.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only essential clinical facts related to suction timing.) 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{A}}$
